evals.prompt: Break this PRD into independently-grabbable GitHub issues.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, reads the PRD from context, drafts vertical tracer-bullet slices, quizzes user on granularity and HITL/AFK classification, then publishes approved issues to https://github.com/BdM-15/proj-theseus/issues with needs-triage label in dependency order.

evals.prompt: Take the proposal-generator skill migration plan and break it into individual implementation tickets.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, explores codebase for domain vocabulary, drafts thin vertical slices (not horizontal layer slices), presents breakdown for user approval, files issues with needs-triage.

evals.prompt: Convert this epic into individual issues I can pick up one at a time.
evals.expected_behavior: Skill activates, identifies tracer-bullet slices from epic context, marks each HITL or AFK, iterates with user until approved, publishes in blocker-first order.
